slides.title: Build carousels like design systems.
slides.subtitle: Write structured content once, render polished social slides with Remotion.

slides.quote: A carousel is not a stack of screenshots. It is a small product experience.
slides.context: The template keeps typography, spacing, surfaces, and pagination consistent across the whole deck.

slides.title: From content model to final PNG.
slides.intro: The renderer separates slide meaning from visual treatment.

tips.title: Model the story
tips.body: Define each slide as JSON: title, quote, tips, comparison, stat, or CTA.

tips.title: Pick a theme
tips.body: Choose a reusable visual variant instead of hand-designing every slide.

tips.title: Render repeatably
tips.body: Use Remotion stills to export consistent Instagram-ready frames.

left.label: Manual
items: Easy to drift from the design system

slides.title: Fork the structure. Replace the content.
slides.body: Use this demo as a starting point for editorial posts, product explainers, launch notes, or internal visual docs.
